name: process-suite
description: Meta-bundle: the engineering-process category in one install — git workflow, approach deliberation, hindsight mining, build-vs-buy gates, rollout planning, docs upkeep, estimation, subagent orchestration, task execution, stack scanning, plugin scouting, and intent-drift guarding (intent-guard). Uninstall cleanly with /process-suite:uninstall — removes the bundle and prunes its auto-installed plugins.
